notice: Generated guide — not official. Architecture authority remains in AGENTS.md and docs/modules/*. Production hosting: Vercel web at https://mc.plxcustomer.io; MCP/swarm operator-local.

claims.canonical_summary: Humans review, approve, assign, and resolve work through Mission Control.
Durable unit connecting planning, execution, completion, audit, delivery, and evidence.
Next.js UI and optimistic client cache; production host Vercel plx-mission-control @ https://mc.plxcustomer.io; a lens, not the system of record.
Authenticated application routes used by web and operator interfaces for governed mutations.

nodes.display_label: Sync — delta engine current; Graph change-notifications deferred (P11)

claims.canonical_summary: Two-way Graph sync, freshness, conflicts, attribution, and audit; notification delivery is deferred.

claims.canonical_claim: AGENTS.md splits sync maturity: delta engine current; Graph change-notifications deferred (P11).
claims.canonical_summary: Delta inbound/outbound sync is current; Graph change-notification subscription renewal and notification queue remain deferred (P11).
Deterministic suggestions, proposals, confirmed mutations, rollout, and retention; no LLM control decisions.
Authenticated and auditable task lifecycle interface; committed default is disabled and enablement is explicit.
Append-only events, sync audit history, checkout references, completion evidence, and test proof.
Separate fast mirror and store for sync metadata, routing/compliance state, and audit history; never canonical over SharePoint.
Composed execution dependency reached through the MCP client; not part of the Vercel application boundary.
Canonical record for human planning data and Task-owned operational records.
Owns pull-request identity and lifecycle metadata linked to Tasks; it does not own planning authority.

claims.canonical_claim: hydrates and sends governed mutations through shared API

edges.display_label: send changes; receive updates; newer attributable human routing edits beat older pending service edits; ambiguous conflicts need manual review

claims.canonical_claim: reconciles outbound mutations and inbound deltas while preserving human authority
stores freshness, conflict, attribution, and audit state

edges.display_label: require fresh data; stop if stale

claims.canonical_claim: requires bounded-fresh routing registers and fails closed when stale
persists sessions, proposals, revisions, decisions, and final links

edges.display_label: manage Task checkout, progress, and completion

claims.canonical_claim: checkout, progress, and completion with audit and evidence
delegates through composed local swarm client
anchors checkout, completion, audit, evidence, and tests
links pull-request identity and delivery lifecycle without transferring planning authority
